content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.nature.com/articles/s41423-023-01033-w.pdf", "source_title": "The immune hunger games: the effects of fasting on monocytes", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "The effect of corticotropin-releasing hormone and neuron-mediated leukocyte shifts on immune responses against autoimmunity and viral...", "direct_quote": "The effect of corticotropin-releasing hormone and neuron-mediated leukocyte shifts on immune responses against autoimmunity and viral infection have been shown previously [2].", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "However, it is essential to note that the research focuses on prolonged fasting and refeeding, which may be more relevant to situations of...", "direct_quote": "However, it is essential to note that the research focuses on prolonged fasting and refeeding, which may be more relevant to situations of severe food scarcity, malnutrition, or eating disorders, rather than intermittent fasting practices, which are ", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "There may be potential bene fi ts to reduce the rate of hematopoiesis through practices such as prolonged fasting, exercise, better sleep...", "direct_quote": "There may be potential bene fi ts to reduce the rate of hematopoiesis through practices such as prolonged fasting, exercise, better sleep hygiene, or improved diet [1].", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from The immune hunger games: the effects of fasting on monocytes."}]}
